headline: 3 Reasons to Sell KHC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Since January 2026, Kraft Heinz has been in a holding pattern, posting a small loss of 3% while floating around $23.67. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 8.5% gain during that period.

headline: Swedish Prosecutor Notifies Millicom That It Has Discontinued Its Preliminary Investigation into Potential Improper Payments Due to Lack of Jurisdiction

headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Is Up 5.1% After Global Reorganization Into Three Regional Operating Hubs
summary: In June 2026, The Kraft Heinz Company announced a major global reorganization effective July 1, 2026, consolidating its operations into three regions, North America, Europe and Pacific Developed Markets, and Emerging Markets, and combining Procurement and Supply Chain into a single central function alongside related executive transitions. This reshaping of Kraft Heinz’s operating model could influence how efficiently the company allocates resources across mature and faster-growing markets,...
